Repository: octocat/example-repo
Title: Fix typo in README
Labels: good first issue
URL: https://github.com/octocat/example-repo/issues/1

Body:
The word 'recieve' on line 12 of README.md should be 'receive'.

Repository: octocat/example-repo
Title: Off-by-one error in pagination
Labels: bug, good first issue
URL: https://github.com/octocat/example-repo/issues/3

Body:
When requesting page 2 with page_size=10, the API returns items 21-30 instead of 11-20. The bug is in paginate() in utils/pagination.py, where the offset calculation uses `page * page_size` instead of `(page - 1) * page_size`.

Repository: octocat/example-repo
Title: Redesign caching layer for better performance
Labels: enhancement
URL: https://github.com/octocat/example-repo/issues/2

Body:
Our current caching approach doesn't scale well under high concurrency. We should investigate alternative architectures such as a distributed cache with consistent hashing, potentially replacing the current LRU implementation across every subsystem that depends on it.

Repository: octocat/example-repo
Title: Improve performance
Labels: enhancement
URL: https://github.com/octocat/example-repo/issues/4

Body:
The app feels slow sometimes. Can we make it faster?
